hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$cmd" =~ ^git\ commit ]]; then echo '🧪 Running tests and build checks...'; set -e; npx nx test p-frog --run && npx nx test api --run && yarn build && yarn build:server && yarn e2e:headless && echo '✅ All checks passed!'; else exit 0; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running tests, build, and e2e checks...
